summary: Tested all features from iteration 2 requirements: navbar button text, homepage sections, products tabs, quiz, /equipo page, /nosotros page, contact modal, productos page buttons, and backend /api/demo endpoint.

minor.issue: Field names are Spanish (nombre, empresa, mensaje) not English (name, company, message). This is by design but worth documenting. API returns 200 with proper Spanish fields.

seed_data_creation: Created test demo request via /api/demo with id d9215e71-951e-420d-a7f9-471c2db11e95
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 test requirements from iteration 2 passed. Navbar shows Contáctanos, homepage has Nosotros/Tecnologia/Productos sections with tabs, quiz works with 3 questions, /equipo shows Felipe Robinet and Federica Morici, /nosotros has no team section but has link to /equipo, modal is Calendly-style 3 steps, Productos/footer buttons say Contáctanos. Backend /api/demo works with Spanish fields (nombre, email, empresa, mensaje).
tests_passed: Navbar: Contáctanos visible (not Reserva una demo)
Homepage: Nosotros section present with misión/visión
Homepage: Productos section with Corporativos/Alianza ED tabs
Homepage: Corporativos tab shows Botbee, Cert, Blog IA
Homepage: Quiz ¿Qué producto necesito? embedded with 3 questions
Contacto form sends to /api/demo (backend confirmed working)
Page /equipo: exists and shows Felipe Robinet and Federica Morici
Page /nosotros: no team section, has link to /equipo, has misión/visión
Modal Contáctanos: opens from navbar, shows Calendly-style calendar (step 1)
Página Productos: buttons say Contáctanos (not Reserva una demo)
Página Estudiantes Digitales: shows Contáctanos button
